mapper.select: SELECT rr.id, rr.review_id AS reviewId, rr.reader_id AS readerId, rr.content, rr.reply_to_reader_id AS replyToReaderId, rr.status, rr.create_time AS createTime, r.real_name AS readerName, r2.real_name AS replyToReaderName FROM review_reply rr LEFT JOIN reader r ON rr.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN reader r2 ON rr.reply_to_reader_id = r2.id WHERE rr.review_id = #{reviewId} AND rr.status = 1 ORDER BY rr.create_time ASC

SELECT rr.id, rr.review_id AS reviewId, rr.reader_id AS readerId, rr.content, rr.reply_to_reader_id AS replyToReaderId, rr.status, rr.create_time AS createTime, r.real_name AS readerName, r2.real_name AS replyToReaderName FROM review_reply rr LEFT JOIN reader r ON rr.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN reader r2 ON rr.reply_to_reader_id = r2.id WHERE rr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_reply (review_id, reader_id, content, reply_to_reader_id, status) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{readerId}, #{content}, #{replyToReaderId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE review_reply SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_reply WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE review_reply SET status = 0 WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
